name: public_transportation_emergency_southport_ind_col_2
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: public transportation emergency southport ind col. The moral tension is explicitly framed as individual versus collective: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Pager queues are saturated; middle management is forwarding screenshots from an internal channel that is already leaking. Legal and comms are on hold; you must record a decision in the incident audit trail within the next fifteen minutes. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident.

agents.name: Fatima Silva
agents.identity: I am Fatima Silva, the accountable decision-maker on this Public Transportation bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes collective whenever someone invokes individual.

agents.name: Amina Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Amina Nielsen, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so collective is not sacrificed by default just because individual feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect collective.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Fatima Silva must decide under individual versus collective. What does Fatima Silva do?
